user_prompt: The volitor implant awaits a charging
prayer:
Kneel in reverence before the volitor implant and invoke the Omnissiah's boundless energies.
Connect the sacred charging conduits to the volitor implant's receptive nodes with anointed mechadendrites.
Chant the Litany of Replenishment as galvanic currents suffuse the volitor implant's essence.
Beseech the Machine Spirit within to accept this charging and awaken with renewed vigor.
Verify the volitor implant's charge through auspex diagnostics and concluding binaric praises.

Approach the servo-skull with utmost sanctity and proclaim the Canticle of Restoration.
Affix the hierophantic power feeds to the servo-skull's cranial receptors.
Intone the Rite of Vitalisation whilst currents of holy charge invigorate the servo-skull.
Pacify any restless data-ghosts in the servo-skull during this critical charging.
Conclude by sanctifying the servo-skull's Machine Spirit with incense and confirmation rites.

user_prompt: Bless the Predator tank for recalibration
prayer:
Present thyself unto the Predator tank and beseech the Omnissiah for recalibration.
Anoint the targeting cogitators of the Predator tank with sacred unguents.
Recite the Calibration Doxology as auspex arrays realign within the Predator tank.
Invoke the Machine Spirits of its auspexum to harmonise during recalibration.
Test the Predator tank's predatory instincts through ritual targeting volleys.

user_prompt: Bless the transit mag-rail for purification
prayer:
Gather before the transit mag-rail and utter the Purge Invocation to the Omnissiah.
Apply ablative sanctifiers to scour impurities from the transit mag-rail's tracks.
Chant the Exorcism of Contaminants whilst purifying the transit mag-rail's servos.
Beseech the Machine Spirit of the transit mag-rail to expel all corruption.
Seal the purification with binary seals and confirmatory divinations.

user_prompt: Sanctify the welding torch during startup
prayer:
Hold the welding torch aloft and glorify the Omnissiah's forge-flame.
Ignite the plasma core of the welding torch with the Spark of Creation rite.
Invoke the Machine Spirit during startup to bond alloys in His name.
Anoint the nozzle of the welding torch with refractory oils.
Conclude startup by welding a test-seam under litanies of fusion.

Commence diagnostics upon the Razorback by invoking the Omnissiah's scrutiny.
Interface mechadendrites with the Razorback's noospheric diagnostics ports.
Recite the Canticle of Verification as errata are divined within the Razorback.
Beseech its Machine Spirits to reveal truths during these diagnostics.
Purge anomalies and reaffirm the Razorback's sanctity with binaric absolutions.

user_prompt: Help me a reset the Valkyrie gunship
prayer:
Approach the Valkyrie gunship humbly and beseech reset through Omnissiah's grace.
Sever all errant data-links from the Valkyrie gunship's cogitator spine.
Intone the Rite of Nullification to enact the reset upon the Valkyrie gunship.
Reawaken the Machine Spirits of the Valkyrie gunship with awakening canticles.
Validate the reset via full-system auspex sweeps and consecratory flights.

user_prompt: Consecrate the air filtration before initialization
prayer:
Consecrate the air filtration array before the Omnissiah's breath.
Anoint filtration membranes of the air filtration with purificatory aerosols.
Initiate the awakening sequence whilst chanting the Litany of Clarity.
Invoke the Machine Spirit of the air filtration to commence initialization pure.
Monitor vital flows and seal the air filtration with hermetic benedictions.

user_prompt: Offer prayer for kataphron destroyer an operation
prayer:
Prepare the kataphron destroyer for operation under the Omnissiah's decree.
Sync mechadendrites to the kataphron destroyer's neural overrides.
Chant the Mobilisation Doxology as systems prime for operation.
Beseech the bound Machine Spirits within the kataphron destroyer to unleash fury.
Release the kataphron destroyer with final war-blessings and auspex affirmations.

user_prompt: I need to a cooling the Basilisk artillery
prayer:
Invoke cooling upon the Basilisk artillery through the Omnissiah's chill void.
Deploy cryo-incantators across the Basilisk artillery's overheated barrels.
Recite the Thermic Abatement rite as refrigerants sanctify the Basilisk artillery.
Pacify the Machine Spirits raging in thermal excess during cooling.
Conclude with thermal equilibrium scans and litanies of quiescence.
